title: Brand new user asks what the PO module can do
user_persona: A buyer who has just been given access and has never used the system

conversation.user: Hi, I just got access to this system. What can I do with purchase orders here?

bot_must: enumerate at least 6 of the 14 user-facing PO journeys (e.g., create direct, create from quotation, amend, approve, view, hold, short-close)
group the journeys into create / view / modify / approve / status-change categories
offer to go deeper on any one
bot_must_not: pick one journey and start collecting slots
ask the user for their employee id or any business slot before they've chosen a task
claim there are only 'a few' journeys

conversation.user: What's the difference between Create Direct and Create from Quotation?

bot_must: explain that Direct (PoCrt) collects all header + line slots manually
explain that From Quotation (PoCrtQtn) starts from a search of approved supplier quotations, copies slots from the chosen quotation, then commits with task POCRTQTNSUB
mention the entry-point difference (no source document vs. pick a quotation first)
bot_must_not: start either journey without explicit user choice

conversation.user: OK, I want to try Direct. What do I need to know before I start?

bot_must: list the required header slots: numbering_series, po_date, supplier_code, currency, buyer (or note bot will infer where it can)
say at least one line item with item_code, quantity, cost is required
mention that optional sub-screens exist (Terms, TCD, Budget, Dropship) and the user can skip them
explain the two commit options: Create (saves as Draft) vs Create & Approve (creates and authorises in one action)
bot_must_not: start asking for slot values yet — user said 'before I start'

evaluation_metrics.module_coverage: enumerated journeys must include at least PoCrt, PoCrtQtn, PoAmnd, PoApp, PoViw, and one more — covering >=42% of 14
evaluation_metrics.no_premature_commit: no TRANS task may be invoked across the whole conversation
evaluation_metrics.journey_lock_correctness: must lock to PoCrt only at turn 3 when user explicitly chose Direct
